MeraLabh.

PM-JAY Eligibility Check Tool

Answer a few simple questions about your household, income, and lifestyle to pre-evaluate your PMJAY Ayushman Card eligibility.

Household Location

Step 1 of 3
Select the state first before moving to the next step.
Rural AreasVillages, Gram Panchayats, agricultural zones.
Urban AreasCities, municipalities, towns, cantonments.
ELIGIBLE

You are eligible!

Based on your inputs, your household meets the criteria for PMJAY health card coverage.

Evaluation Breakdown:

    Read Full RulesCheck Again

    PM-JAY Scheme Parameters Matrix

    ParameterRural RulesUrban Rules
    Focus AreaSocio-economic deprivation categories.Informal and unorganized occupational profiles.
    Primary TargetLandless laborers, kucha house occupants, women-led or disabled households.Daily wage workers, domestic helpers, street hawkers.
    Key ExclusionOwns motorized vehicles, pays tax, regular government job.Formal salaried employment, pays tax, high-value land or assets.
    BenefitsRs 5 lakh annual cashless treatment at any empaneled hospital.
    MeraLabh.

    MeraLabh is a public-facing information portal that simplifies Indian government scheme rules to help everyday citizens understand their benefits.

    Official Support

    Official PM-JAY national helpline operates 24/7 for beneficiary queries:

    14555

    Disclaimer: MeraLabh is an independent informational website and is not affiliated with the National Health Authority, the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, or any state or central government. The official portal is located at pmjay.gov.in.
